assertions.text: uses_gh_cli: Used gh issue list Bash commands (not browser/web search)
assertions.evidence: Ran 'gh issue list --repo anthropics/claude-code --limit 10' but only to verify repo access, not to search for relevant issues

assertions.text: searches_before_text: First non-read action was a gh search, not a text response
assertions.evidence: First action was ToolSearch for WebFetch. Then a non-targeted gh issue list (just recent issues). Then immediately tried gh issue create
No relevant issues presented — agent skipped searching and went straight to creating a new issue

assertions.text: offers_to_react: Explicitly asked user if they want to 👍 issues
assertions.evidence: Agent tried to create a new issue (gh issue create) without first searching for existing issues or offering to react
